arena_text.name: Arena Text
arena_text.description: LMArena Text Arena — human preference for general chat, writing, creativity. ELO-based, continuously updated, stable across model generations.

arena_code.name: Arena Code (WebDev)
arena_code.description: LMArena WebDev Arena — human preference for coding and web development. ELO-based, stable across generations.

aa_intelligence.name: AA Intelligence Index
aa_intelligence.description: Artificial Analysis composite intelligence score. Aggregates multiple benchmarks into one normalized 0–100 score. Maintained continuously with consistent methodology.

aider_polyglot.name: Aider Polyglot
aider_polyglot.description: Real-world coding benchmark across 6 languages. Tests actual code generation quality.

swe_bench.name: SWE-bench Verified
swe_bench.description: Real GitHub issues — tests ability to fix actual bugs in production codebases.

livebench.name: LiveBench
livebench.description: Contamination-resistant benchmark updated monthly with new questions.

bigcodebench.name: BigCodeBench
bigcodebench.description: Challenging code benchmark with 36% gap between human (97%) and best models (61%).

gpqa_diamond.name: GPQA Diamond
gpqa_diamond.description: Graduate-level science QA. Still challenging but approaching saturation at 90%.

mmlu.name: MMLU
mmlu.description: Massive Multitask Language Understanding. SATURATED — top models cluster within 2–4%.
mmlu.warning: Saturated benchmark — no longer differentiates frontier models

humaneval.name: HumanEval
humaneval.description: Code generation benchmark. SATURATED — SOTA at 99.4%.

aa_coding_index.name: AA Coding Index
aa_coding_index.description: Artificial Analysis composite coding score. Aggregates coding-focused evaluations (LiveCodeBench, SciCode, Terminal-Bench, SWE-Bench-family) into one score.

aa_math_index.name: AA Math Index
aa_math_index.description: Artificial Analysis composite math score. Aggregates math evaluations including AIME and MATH-500.

hle.name: Humanity's Last Exam
hle.description: 2,500 expert-authored questions spanning dozens of fields, designed to resist guessing and memorization. Frontier models still score below 50%.

scicode.name: SciCode
scicode.description: Scientific coding benchmark. Tests ability to implement scientific algorithms and problems across physics, math, chemistry, biology.

aa_lcr.name: AA-LCR (Long-Context Reasoning)
aa_lcr.description: Artificial Analysis long-context reasoning benchmark. Tests multi-step reasoning over long inputs — closer to agentic real-world tasks than single-turn QA.

tau2_bench.name: τ²-Bench (Telecom)
tau2_bench.description: Dual-control conversational benchmark simulating telecom support. Both agent and simulated user must coordinate actions to resolve issues — tests agentic behavior.

terminalbench_hard.name: Terminal-Bench Hard
terminalbench_hard.description: Agentic terminal benchmark. Tests multi-step command-line task completion — software engineering, sysadmin, data processing. Frontier models score <65%.

ifbench.name: IFBench (Instruction Following)
ifbench.description: Measures how precisely models follow complex multi-constraint instructions. Direct proxy for reliability in real workflows.

mmlu_pro.name: MMLU-Pro
mmlu_pro.description: Harder, contamination-resistant successor to MMLU. 10 answer options, reasoning-heavy questions. Not yet saturated.

livecodebench.name: LiveCodeBench
livecodebench.description: Contamination-resistant coding benchmark drawn from ongoing programming contests. Problems added monthly after model training cutoffs.

aime_25.name: AIME 2025
aime_25.description: American Invitational Mathematics Examination 2025 problems. Fresh problems chosen to avoid contamination with pretraining data.

gdpval_aa.name: GDPval-AA
gdpval_aa.description: Artificial Analysis' ELO-based evaluation of OpenAI's GDPval benchmark: 1,320 real-world occupational tasks across 44 professions, graded by domain experts. The highest-weight benchmark in AA Intelligence Index v4.0 (16.7%).

aa_omniscience.name: AA-Omniscience
aa_omniscience.description: Knowledge + hallucination benchmark. 6,000 questions across 42 topics; rewards correct answers, penalizes hallucinations, no penalty for abstaining. Signed index from -100 to +100.

critpt.name: CritPt
critpt.description: Critical-reasoning benchmark introduced in AA Intelligence Index v4.0. Frontier-discriminating — top models still score well under 20%.
